scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The project runtime class set adds GameInputProfileUtility and GameBoardAnimationUtility and the gameplay HUD now keeps additional score and control labels resident. Two complete Godot 4.7/GUT runs held ShapedText at 4 while TextureStorage and Font did not grow; the final 275-test suite passed with 1685 assertions before this audited recalibration.
